message:
feat(test): add anti-starvation tiering proptests for CaptureScheduler

Add 5 property-based tests verifying the tiered anti-starvation
algorithm in select_panes: low-priority floor guarantee, all-high and
all-low tier allocation, mixed-tier total bounds, and ID provenance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
